content.full_text:
March 31, 1981

Supervisor John Molinari  
Room 235 City Hall  
San Francisco, CA 94102

Dear Supervisor Molinari:

This letter will confirm advice given to you today in our telephone conversation.

Your question was, if a committee controlled by a candidate transfers funds to another committee by the same candidate would a threshold filing be required. The transfer of funds from one controlled committee to another is not considered a contribution to another candidate or committee for the purpose of determining whether a contribution has been made and a threshold statement is required. However, the transfer would be considered an expenditure for the purpose of determining if expenditures have been made of $500 or more.

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact me.

Yours very truly,

Lynn Montgomery  
Political Reform Consultant

LM/bb
